message: 🌱 Add vitess: RFC: New vexplain command having a format to glean mission (#586)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vitess-11621-rfc-new-vexplain-command-having-a-format-to-glean-information-about",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vitess: RFC: New vexplain command having a format to glean information about vtgate and MySQL plans",
+    "description": "RFC: New vexplain command having a format to glean information about vtgate and MySQL plans. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vitess deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your vitess version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nhelm list -n vitess 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working vitess installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vitess configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant vitess configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nkubectl get configmap -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=vitess\n```\n### Description\n\nWe propose adding a new Vitess-specific command called `vexplain`, which extends the `explain` query that MySQL offers."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for RFC: New vexplain command having a format to glean",
+        "description": "In https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/issues/11621 we proposed adding a new Vitess-specific command called `vexplain`, which extends the `explain` query that MySQL offers. This PR does just that. :)\n\nWe are also deprecating `explain format=vitess` and `explain format=vtexplain`.\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nkubectl get events -n vitess --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"RFC: New vexplain command having a format to glean\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "In https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/issues/11621 we proposed adding a new Vitess-specific command called `vexplain`, which extends the `explain` query that MySQL offers. This PR does just that. :)\n\nWe are also deprecating `explain format=vitess` and `explain format=vtexplain`.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
